name: ultralight-launch-web
description: Launch-focused Ultralight web surface for external-agent tool install, discovery, widgets, and Light wallet.

scripts.pages:deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && pnpm dlx wrangler@4.67.0 pages deploy dist --project-name ultralight-launch-web --branch staging
scripts.pages:deploy:production: npm run build:production && pnpm dlx wrangler@4.67.0 pages deploy dist --project-name ultralight-launch-web --branch main
